message:
feat(stats/persist): wire live persistence status and error reply counters into INFO

- Store gains aof_enabled, stat_rdb_last_bgsave_ok, stat_aof_last_bgrewrite_ok,
  stat_aof_last_write_ok, and stat_unexpected_error_replies fields (all defaulting
  to safe/zero values) with record_* helpers
- INFO persistence now reflects real bgsave/aof status instead of hardcoded "ok";
  aof_enabled reports actual store flag set via set_aof_path
- INFO stats reports live unexpected_error_replies and CONFIG RESETSTAT clears it
- Runtime introduces ExecutionSource (Client / AofLoad / ReplicationReplay) so
  errors during AOF load and replication replay are counted as unexpected_error_replies
  rather than client-visible errors; error counters are merged back on AOF load failure
- Conformance fixtures add psync_rejects_invalid_offset, replicaof state/idempotency,
  WAITAOF-on-replica, and ROLE slave state cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+        "value": "ERR value is not an integer or out of range"

         "value": "OK"

+      "now_ms": 0,

+        "6380"

+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "simple",
+        "value": "OK"

+    },

+      "name": "role_reports_replica_connect_state",
+      "now_ms": 0,

+        "ROLE"

+        "value": [

+            "value": "slave"
+          },
+          {

+            "value": "127.0.0.1"
+          },
+          {
+            "kind": "integer",
+            "value": 6380
+          },

+            "value": "connect"

+            "value": 0

+      "name": "replicaof_same_master_is_idempotent",

+        "127.0.0.1",
+        "6380"

+      "expect": {

+    },
+    {
+      "name": "waitaof_rejects_replica_instances",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "WAITAOF",
+        "0",
+        "0",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "error",
+        "value": "ERR WAITAOF cannot be used with replica instances. Please also note that writes to replicas are just local and are not propagated."
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "replicaof_no_one_promotes_back_to_master",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "REPLICAOF",
+        "NO",
+        "ONE"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "simple",
+        "value": "OK"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "role_reports_master_after_promotion",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "ROLE"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": [

+            "kind": "bulk",
+            "value": "master"
+          },
+          {
+            "kind": "integer",
+            "value": 0
+          },
+          {
+            "kind": "array",
+            "value": []
+          }
+        ]
+      }
+    },

+        "value": "FULLRESYNC 0000000000000000000000000000000000000001 0"
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "slaveof_no_one",
       "now_ms": 0,
